name: hearthvale
description: Original responsive seasonal farming, ranching, quality-aware cooking, regional fishing, bait, tackle, legendary catches, temporary meal buffs, expanded interiors, resident relationships, story, guild combat, equipment, and a 50-floor cave adventure.
